entries.title: R-V138P0-02 follow-up: CLI status command should surface on-disk missing-file hints
entries.closure_note: V1.40 P4 T4: waived — daemon reconcile-chapters is the validation authority; CLI displays body_path for human cross-check only. Commit 69250f10.
entries.note: DB SSOT preserved; reconcile-chapters covers remediation. Add explicit check-and-emit in status arm in a follow-up.

entries.title: R-V138P0-04 follow-up: WorkApiDto.chapters vector size cap or pagination (defense-in-depth)
entries.source: qc1 W-002 + qc3 S-2 (V1.39 P5 review)
entries.closure_note: V1.40 P4 T4: deferred — structural feature requiring schema/API changes. Documented in works handler. Commit 69250f10.
entries.note: At typical novel scales (<=100 chapters) this is fine; not a practical concern.

entries.title: R-V138P1-04 follow-up: outline_path/body_path required with no defaults for non-CLI callers
entries.closure_note: V1.40 P4 T4: waived — daemon already validates via evaluate_gates and POST /v1/local/presets:validate. Documented in preset_management.rs. Commit 69250f10.
entries.note: If a non-CLI caller (e.g., e2e test, daemon, or future API) constructs preset.input directly without going through CLI stage_advance, the required: true constraint means template rendering fails.
